title: eval.run task payload (v1)
description: Input payload for the eval agent's eval.run skill — PRD part-2. Sent as an A2A data part (or a JSON text part).

targetUrl.description: The migrated page being evaluated, e.g. https://main--site--owner.aem.page/path

sourceType.description: What the page is compared against. 'none' auto-skips the content dimension.

sourceLocation.description: PDF or webpage URL (or r2://artifacts/... key). Required unless sourceType=none.

dimensions.description: Subset of dimensions to run. Default: all. (v1 engine runs all regardless; honored from v2.)

mode.description: Scoring mode. 'fidelity' (default) scores the target against the source — content = source-vs-target diff, visual = screenshot comparison (use for real migrations). 'quality' scores the page ON ITS OWN MERITS — content = intrinsic editorial quality, visual = intrinsic design quality, source ignored (use for AI-generated content where the synthetic source is a throwaway and fidelity to it is not the goal).

runId.description: Optional — links the task to a coordinator run

labels.description: Optional free-form labels, flow to eval_reports for grouping
